version_description: Lots of chord changes and additions, removed some unnecessary spacing.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] - - - - [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch] - - - - [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
                         Oooh, yeah[/tab]
  
[Verse]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]E7/B[/ch]
    You might been hurt, babe[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
    That ain't no lie[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
    You've seen them all come and go,   oh...[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
    I remember you told me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]
    That it made you believe in[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
    No man, no cry[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
    Maybe that's why[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
    Every little thing I do[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
    Never seems enough for you[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]E/G#[/ch]
    You don't wanna lose it again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
    But I'm not like them[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
    Baby, when you fina - lly[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]
    Get to love somebo - dy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
    Guess what[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E7[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]
    It's gonna be me..[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
    You've got no choice, babe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
    But to move on, and you know[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
    There ain't no time to waste[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
    You're just too blind to see[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                                      [ch]Em[/ch]
    But in the end, ya know it's gonna be me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
    You can't deny, so just tell me why[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
    Every little thing I do[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
    Never seems enough for you[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]E/G#[/ch]
    You don't wanna lose it again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
    But I'm not like them[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
    Baby, when you fina - lly[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E/G#[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]
    Get to love somebo - dy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
    Guess what[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E7[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
    It's gonna be me..                      Oooh, yeah...[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
    There comes a day when I'll be the one, you'll see..[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E7[/ch]
    It's gonna, gonna, gonna, gonna, gonna[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E/G#[/ch]     ( [ch]Am[/ch] )
    It's gonna be me[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
    All that I do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
    Is not enough for you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]E/G#[/ch]
    Don't wanna lose it[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
    But I'm not like that[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
    When finally (finally)[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
    You get to love[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
    Guess what (guess what)[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
    Every little thing I do[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
    Never seems enough for you[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]E/G#[/ch]
    You don't wanna lose it again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
    But I'm not like them[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
    Baby, when you fina - lly[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]
    Get to love somebo - dy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]     
    Guess what[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]          
    It's gonna be me[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
    Every little thing I do[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
    Never seems enough for you[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]E/G#[/ch]
    You don't wanna lose it again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
    But I'm not like them[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]G/B[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
    Baby, when you fina - lly[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E/G#[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]
    Get to love somebo - dy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
    Guess what[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E7[/ch]            ( [ch]Am[/ch] )
    It's gonna be me..[/tab]
